description_long: A rectangular wooden serving board holds five pieces of maki sushi, each wrapped in a dark seaweed layer with visible white rice and assorted fillings at the center. The sushi pieces are arranged in a loose cluster, showcasing their cylindrical shape and the contrast between the nori exterior and the bright rice interior. The fillings appear to include small bits of vegetables or seafood, adding subtle color variations within the rolls. The wooden board has a natural grain pattern and a small circular hole near one edge, suggesting it is a rustic serving platter. The sushi pieces have a slightly glossy appearance from the rice and nori, while the board itself is matte and textured. No additional garnishes, sauces, or utensils are present on the board.
description: Five maki sushi rolls with visible rice and fillings are arranged on a rustic wooden serving board with a small hole near one edge.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sushi pieces clustered near the center of the wooden board, with the board's grain and a small hole visible at the far end.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the wooden board and the arrangement of the sushi pieces, with the hole on the right edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the sushi from the opposite end, emphasizing the board's length and the hole now in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the sushi pieces and the board's edge, with the hole on the left and the sushi more spread out.
